urls.title: URLs
urls.description: Cyklobazar URLs to scrape offers from (e.g. category pages with filters)

detailedOutput.title: Detailed Output
detailedOutput.description: If true, also scrapes the complete offer details. If you only need the Telegram notifications, you can leave this unchecked for faster and cheaper scraping.

startDate.title: Start Date
startDate.description: Only scrape offers published after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

telegramToken.title: Telegram Bot Token
telegramToken.description: Telegram bot token for sending notifications

telegramChatId.title: Telegram Chat ID
telegramChatId.description: Telegram chat ID to send notifications to
